arts.ttl: Manchester United XI vs Real Sociedad: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injuries for Europa League
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim dealt blow double blow for biggest game of the season yet

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim aware of ‘consequences’ if Manchester United’s poor form continues
arts.sum: United will look to bounce back when they face Real Sociedad in the last 16 of the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim defends Man United's failure to register 17-year-old star Chido Obi in the Europa League
arts.sum: The 17-year-old striker has been prolific for United's youth teams and came off the bench in three of the last four games with Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee struggling in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Frustrated Ruben Amorim makes Man Utd sack admission and refuses to change style of play
arts.sum: The Manchester United boss is coming under increasing pressure after the slow start to his tenure, and he says he knows what could happen if results continue to be poor

arts.ttl: Amorim doubles down: We don't have to win Europa League to improve
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has doubled down on his comments that Manchester United do not have to win this season's Europa League to make steps forward - claiming the club can still attract top players without Champions League football next term.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane's Man United training ground visit gives insight into what he'd offer Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Roy Keane was given access all areas to the Manchester United squad back in 2019 when Ole Gunnar Solskjaer invited the club legend and his old team-mate to speak to his young team

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich, Liverpool & Man Utd learn asking price for Angelo Stiller
arts.sum: The major European clubs interested in Stuttgart midfielder Angelo Stiller face having to pay considerably more than a release clause in his current contract.

arts.ttl: ‘Completely disagree’ – Antony’s agent takes aim at Man United boss Amorim
arts.sum: The agent of Manchester United star Antony has on Wednesday made use of the opportunity to aim something of a jibe at Red Devils head coach Ruben Amorim. This, of…

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad boss hits back at claims his side are FAVOURITES against Man United - as he hails 'excellent manager' Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's misfiring side take on the LaLiga outfit in San Sebastian on Thursday in the first leg of a crunch Europa League round-of-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why his 3-4-3 formation is not the problem at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man United switched to a 3-4-3 formation when Ruben Amorim was appointed in November and they have only won ten games since.
